name: Starling Bank API
what_it_does: UK neobank with comprehensive developer API for both personal and business accounts — enabling payment initiation, account management, savings spaces, and webhook notifications, with dedicated Business API for company banking automation and BaaS partner program.
use_cases: Initiating GBP payments (Faster Payments, CHAPS) via Payment API for business automation
Reading transaction history and categorized spending data for finance integrations
Managing savings spaces (sub-accounts) programmatically for budget allocation
Webhook notifications for real-time payment received and sent events
Building BaaS products on Starling's infrastructure via API partner program
not_for: High-volume merchant payment acceptance (use Stripe or Adyen)
Teams outside UK building banking features without UK operations
best_when: A UK business or fintech needs automated banking operations — payments, account management, and real-time notifications — with a developer-friendly bank that has strong API support.
avoid_when: You're outside the UK, need multi-currency business accounts (Revolut is better), or need consumer-scale lending or credit products.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for user-facing apps. Personal access tokens for automated scripts. Scoped access: read-only, payment initiation, account management. Sandbox environment for testing. Webhook secret for HMAC verification.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; Starling Business account included
pricing.paid_tiers: No API fee; Business accounts free with no monthly fee
pricing.notes: Business banking account free with no monthly fees. API access included. FCA-regulated UK bank. UK only. Partner API program for BaaS and fintech integrators. Developer-friendly with comprehensive documentation and sandbox.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per endpoint; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Excellent REST API documentation. Business API covers payments, accounts, payees, direct debits, and savings spaces. Payment initiation (FPS, CHAPS) available. Webhook with HMAC signing. Sandbox with realistic test data. Personal access tokens for automation scripts.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Payments support idempotency via externalIdentifier field. Account reads fully idempotent. Savings space management idempotent. Webhook registration idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: UK only — Faster Payments and CHAPS are UK payment schemes
PSD2 SCA re-consent every 90 days for third-party access
KYB verification required for business account before API production use
OAuth2 scopes must be requested at app registration — cannot add scopes later without re-auth

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. FCA-regulated bank — strong regulatory security. OAuth2 with scopes. PSD2 compliant. GDPR compliant. Webhook HMAC signing. SCA re-consent. Payment idempotency keys prevent duplicate transactions. Excellent security posture for a banking API.
